description_long: This object is a modern grave marker set on a rectangular stone base, featuring two upright slabs of contrasting colors—one black and one light gray—positioned side by side. The slabs are vertically oriented and slightly offset, with the black slab being shorter and wider, while the gray slab is taller and narrower. The base is composed of a thick, rectangular stone platform with a slightly raised section supporting the upright slabs. The main horizontal surface is a flat, polished stone, likely intended as a grave cover, matching the gray color of one of the slabs. The overall design is minimalist and geometric, with clean lines and a contemporary aesthetic. No visible inscriptions, engravings, or decorative elements are present on the surfaces.
description: A modern grave marker with two upright stone slabs—one black, one gray—on a rectangular stone base with a flat grave cover.
description_view_0: Front view showing both upright slabs, with the black slab on the left and the taller gray slab on the right, both mounted on a rectangular stone base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the slabs and the layered structure of the stone base, with the gray slab more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the alignment of the slabs and the full length of the grave cover, with the black slab now on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the black slab and the depth of the base, with the gray slab partially visible.
